summary: Made two surgical seam edits: shifted the opening into Lena's immediate bodily/sensory point of entry so it does not mirror the neighboring chapter's institutional-measurement lead-in, and adjusted the closing beat to land on active time-monitoring rather than another dark-room body/system handoff.
edits: Reordered the opening sentence so the chapter enters through Lena's physical experience before the facility schedule details.
Reframed the final image around Lena watching the clock and the written receipt evidence, sharpening the handoff into chapter 3 while distinguishing it from chapter 1's ending.
